title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: A Discounted Cash Flow analysis for Zimmer Biomet to determine its intrinsic value.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 5.0% - A base revenue growth of 5% is reasonable for Zimmer Biomet, reflecting a mature market position but balanced by the aging demographic tailwinds and a 10.9% trailing growth rate.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.0% - The terminal growth rate is estimated at 2.0%, aligning with long-term macroeconomic inflation expectations and GDP growth for a stable medical device manufacturer.
assumptions.discountRate: 7.45% - A discount rate of 7.45% is estimated based on the company's relatively low beta of 0.591, combined with a standard 4.2% risk-free rate and 5.5% equity risk premium.
